eviction_rule: delete raw HDF5 payload from data/extended_corpus/<target>/ immediately after turboSETI + pipeline candidate report generation completes for that target
pin_rule: pin only the compact derived candidate report/manifest, never the raw HDF5
stop_condition: stop if TECHNO_LOCAL_STORAGE_CAP_GB (100GB) would be exceeded, or if this batch cap (50GB) is reached
manifest_owner: agent-prepared, awaiting explicit user raw-download approval
notes: Top-198-priority targets from the 1147-target/289GB raw_download_approval_required queue, capped at 50GB (real headroom is ~91GB under the 100GB hard local storage cap; this batch leaves ~41GB additional buffer). NOT YET APPROVED for download -- prepared per user request to keep moving rather than just document the constraint.
